pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 30: $data->shortname = 'BIO101'; creates parent course with this exact shortname
setup_task.sh line 44: $data->shortname = 'BIO101-LAB'; creates child course with this exact shortname
export_result.sh line 23: WHERE courseid=$CHILD_ID AND enrol='meta' AND customint1=$PARENT_ID - verifies the enrollment method type is 'meta'

privileged_info_summary: The task configures a Course Meta Link enrollment method in Moodle. The parent course shortname is BIO101 ('Introduction to Biology'), and the child course shortname is BIO101-LAB ('Introduction to Biology Lab'). The expected enrollment method type is 'meta', which automatically synchronizes student enrollments from the parent course to the child course. The data is entirely synthetic and created dynamically during task setup via PHP scripts using the Moodle internal API.
